title: WebFinger Content-Type should be application/jrd+json
description: RFC 7033 Section 10.2 specifies the WebFinger response media type as application/jrd+json. The server currently returns application/json. While most implementations accept both, strict RFC 7033 conformance requires application/jrd+json. Discovered during conformance testing against http://127.0.0.1:3847/.well-known/webfinger.
close_reason: WebFinger now returns Content-Type: application/jrd+json per RFC 7033
